title: consumer VS Code test run lock
description: On-disk format of the cross-run lock at .devtools/locks/vscode-tests.lock. Promoted from an inline struct/path constant to a defined contract file so every consumer of the discover/plan/run protocol agrees on the lock shape instead of reimplementing it. A held lock names the owning process (pid), when it was taken (created_at), the selected test ids of the run holding it, and an ownership token proving the releaser is the acquirer. A stale lock — pid no longer alive, or not a vscode process — may be reclaimed.
